The Friday Note · Issue #8

The Data Layer Gets Real

April 3, 2026 · Chris O'Hara

This week: SAP's Reltio acquisition signals a new era for enterprise data and AI. Plus: a new assessment to benchmark where you stand in the AI transformation — and a preview of the curriculum we're building for PMMs.

🎯 Featured

Where Do You Sit?

One of the hardest questions in the AI transformation isn't what tools to use — it's understanding where you actually stand in your relationship with AI.

🧠

Where Do You Sit?

A 3-minute assessment that maps your cognitive relationship with AI across three dimensions.

Sign Up to Take the Assessment →

This is the first piece of a larger curriculum we're building for PMMs navigating the agentic era. More below.

🔥 Deep Dive

SAP Acquires Reltio: What PMMs Need to Know

This week SAP announced it's acquiring Reltio, the master data management leader, to make enterprise data "AI-ready."

The headline:

"AI cannot reach its full potential when data is fragmented across business units, platforms and domains without connection or context."

— Muhammad Alam, SAP Executive Board

Why This Matters for PMMs

1. The "golden record" is the new competitive moat. Reltio's AI-based entity resolution creates a single source of truth across SAP and non-SAP systems.

2. MCP support changes everything. Reltio supports the Model Context Protocol, enabling real-time multiagent workflows across enterprise systems.

3. SAP Business Data Cloud expands for agentic AI. BDC is becoming a fully interoperable platform—reinforcing the thesis that full-stack buyers need full-stack data.

The PMM takeaway: "AI-ready data" is becoming table stakes. The question isn't whether your customers have clean data — it's whether their data can power autonomous agents.

📚 Coming Soon

The PMM Curriculum for the Agentic Era

We're building a comprehensive learning program for product marketers. Not a book — a guided curriculum with assessments, exercises, and practical frameworks.

The curriculum includes full content, quizzes, downloadable guides, and real-world exercises. We're rolling it out over the coming weeks.

Want early access? Sign up now and you'll be first to know when new units drop.

📰 Quick Hits

This Week in AI + Marketing

Google AI Mode Ads Go Live

Shopping and travel ads now appear in AI conversational searches. Live checkout inside conversations.

ChatGPT Ads Hit $100M in 6 Weeks

OpenAI's ad business expanding to Canada, Australia, and NZ. 600+ advertisers participating.

Reddit: The Most Undervalued Channel?

Fospha report shows 257% YoY revenue growth, 82% higher ROAS when accounting for Amazon conversions.

Tariffs Squeezing Marketing Budgets

90% of ad buyers concerned about impact. 52% of marketing execs expect tighter budgets.
